nl_query: List workflow transitions allowed for the CUSTODIAN role on answer scripts.
failed_sql:
SELECT wst.id, wst.entity_type, wst.from_state, wst.to_state, wst.requires_reason, wst.created_at
FROM   workflow_state_transition wst
JOIN   app_user au ON au.id = wst.created_by
WHERE  au.role = 'CUSTODIAN'
